conn.close\(\)
")

import os, json, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from datetime import date, timedelta
load_dotenv\('/root/agent/.env'\)

ACCESS_TOKEN = os.environ['META_ACCESS_TOKEN']
AD_ACCOUNT_ID = os.environ['META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID']
BASE_URL = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0'

campaign_id = '6955726335293'
start = date.today\(\).isoformat\(\)
end   = \(date.today\(\) + timedelta\(days=30\)\).isoformat\(\)

zip_codes = ['94596','94595','94588','94586','94583','94582','94568','94566','94563','94556']
targeting = {
    'geo_locations': {
        'zips': [{'key': f'US:{z}'} for z in zip_codes],
    },
    'age_min': 35,
    'age_max': 65,
}

data = {
    'access_token': ACCESS_TOKEN,
    'name': '[RMA TEST] Design Build — East Bay',
    'campaign_id': campaign_id,
    'status': 'PAUSED',
    'optimization_goal': 'LEAD_GENERATION',
    'billing_event': 'IMPRESSIONS',
    'bid_amount': 1000,
    'daily_budget': 12500,
    'start_time': f'{start}T00:00:00-0700',
    'end_time': f'{end}T23:59:59-0700',
    'targeting': json.dumps\(targeting\),
}
r = requests.post\(f'{BASE_URL}/{AD_ACCOUNT_ID}/adsets', data=data, timeout=30\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\(json.dumps\(r.json\(\), indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1)

import os, json, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from datetime import date, timedelta
load_dotenv\('/root/agent/.env'\)

ACCESS_TOKEN = os.environ['META_ACCESS_TOKEN']
AD_ACCOUNT_ID = os.environ['META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID']
BASE_URL = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0'

campaign_id = '6955726335293'
start = date.today\(\).isoformat\(\)
end   = \(date.today\(\) + timedelta\(days=30\)\).isoformat\(\)

zip_codes = ['94596','94595','94588','94586','94583','94582','94568','94566','94563','94556']
targeting = {
    'geo_locations': {'zips': [{'key': f'US:{z}'} for z in zip_codes]},
}
data = {
    'access_token': ACCESS_TOKEN,
    'name': '[RMA TEST] Design Build — East Bay',
    'campaign_id': campaign_id,
    'status': 'PAUSED',
    'optimization_goal': 'LEAD_GENERATION',
    'billing_event': 'IMPRESSIONS',
    'bid_amount': 1000,
    'daily_budget': 12500,
    'start_time': f'{start}T00:00:00-0700',
    'end_time': f'{end}T23:59:59-0700',
    'targeting': json.dumps\(targeting\),
}
r = requests.post\(f'{BASE_URL}/{AD_ACCOUNT_ID}/adsets', data=data, timeout=30\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\(json.dumps\(r.json\(\), indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(venv/bin/python3 - <<'EOF' 2>&1
import requests, gzip

url = "https://bingadsappsstorageprod.blob.core.windows.net/geolocationscsv/2.0/en/GeoLocations.csv?skoid=e697f752-fbaf-4c0b-999c-e188178a9ed3&sktid=975f013f-7f24-47e8-a7d3-abc4752bf346&skt=2026-03-20T16%3A27%3A29Z&ske=2026-03-27T16%3A27%3A29Z&sks=b&skv=2025-11-05&sv=2025-11-05&st=2026-03-22T01%3A15%3A17Z&se=2026-03-22T01%3A35%3A17Z&sr=b&sp=rl&sig=wyjNGAWwOVCQi3aM12DQk1uyPLJT6%2Bg%2BW9NllIrvYWs%3D"

print\("Downloading GeoLocations.csv..."\)
r = requests.get\(url, timeout=60\)
print\(f"Status: {r.status_code}, Size: {len\(r.content\)} bytes"\)
print\("Content-Type:", r.headers.get\("Content-Type", "unknown"\)\)

# Try to parse - might be gzipped
content = r.content
try:
    data = gzip.decompress\(content\).decode\("utf-8"\)
    print\("Decompressed successfully"\)
except:
    data = content.decode\("utf-8", errors="replace"\)
    print\("Not gzipped, decoded as UTF-8"\)

lines = data.strip\(\).split\("\\n"\)
print\(f"Total rows: {len\(lines\)}"\)
print\("Header:", lines[0][:200] if lines else "none"\)

# Search for our California targets
TARGET_NAMES = [
    "walnut creek", "pleasanton", "san ramon", "dublin", "danville",
    "orinda", "lafayette", "moraga", "alamo", "diablo", "sunol",
    "contra costa", "alameda county",
    "94596", "94595", "94588", "94586", "94583", "94582", "94568", "94566", "94563", "94556"
]

results = []
for line in lines[1:]:
    line_lower = line.lower\(\)
    for target in TARGET_NAMES:
        if target in line_lower:
            results.append\(line.strip\(\)\)
            break

print\(f"\\nFound {len\(results\)} matching rows:"\)
for r in results[:50]:
    print\(r\)
EOF)

Bash(venv/bin/python3 << 'EOF'
import db, json
OLD = "ridgecrest-designs.lovable.app"
NEW_BASE = "https://go.ridgecrestdesigns.com"

with db.get_db\(\) as \(conn, cur\):
    cur.execute\("SELECT id, google_ad_id, final_urls FROM ads WHERE final_urls::text LIKE '%ridgecrest-designs.lovable.app%'"\)
    ads = cur.fetchall\(\)
    print\(f"Fixing {len\(ads\)} Microsoft DB records..."\)
    for a in ads:
        urls = a['final_urls']
        if not urls:
            continue
        # Rebuild: replace base URL, preserve UTM params but update domain
        new_urls = []
        for u in urls:
            if OLD in u:
                # Parse: new base + old query string if any
                if '?' in u:
                    qs = u.split\('?', 1\)[1]
                    # Update utm_source reference
                    new_urls.append\(f"{NEW_BASE}?{qs}"\)
                else:
                    new_urls.append\(NEW_BASE\)
            else:
                new_urls.append\(u\)
        cur.execute\("UPDATE ads SET final_urls=%s WHERE id=%s", \(json.dumps\(new_urls\), a['id']\)\)
    conn.commit\(\)
    
    # Verify all clean
    cur.execute\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM ads WHERE final_urls::text LIKE '%ridgecrest-designs.lovable.app%'"\)
    print\(f"Remaining: {cur.fetchone\(\)['cnt']}"\)
EOF)
